ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sellers" (
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seller */,
  "seller_name" TEXT /* Name of the seller */,
  "seller_rating" REAL /* Rating of the seller */,
  "seller_review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews the seller has received */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the seller */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the seller is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the seller is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code where the seller is located */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the seller */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the seller */,
  "dealer_type" TEXT /* Type of dealer (e.g., individual, dealership) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "body_style" TEXT /* Body style of the vehicle */,
  "color_ext" TEXT /* Exterior color of the vehicle */,
  "color_int" TEXT /* Interior color of the vehicle */,
  "drive_train" TEXT /* Drive train of the vehicle */,
  "engine" TEXT /* Engine specifications of the vehicle */,
  "transmission" TEXT /* Transmission of the vehicle */,
  "fuel" TEXT /* Fuel type of the vehicle */,
  "features" TEXT /* List of features of the vehicle */,
  "VIN" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Current mileage of the vehicle */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the vehicle (e.g., excellent, good, fair) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle listing */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "list_date" TEXT /* Date the vehicle was listed */,
  "list_price" REAL /* Initial price of the vehicle */,
  "listing_status" TEXT /* Status of the listing (e.g., active, sold, pending) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the vehicle */,
  "seller_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes from the seller about the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES sellers ("seller_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller being reviewed */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer who left the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was left */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the buyer (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES sellers ("seller_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., buyer, seller, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle history record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "history_type" TEXT /* Type of history event (e.g., accident, ownership change) */,
  "history_date" TEXT /* Date of the history event */,
  "history_details" TEXT /* Details of the history event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_history_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_images_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the listing */,
  "inquiries" INTEGER /* Number of inquiries for the listing */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares for the listing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES sellers ("seller_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_certifications" (
  "cert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "certification_type" TEXT /* Type of certification (e.g., Certified Pre-Owned) */,
  "certification_date" TEXT /* Date of the certification */,
  "certification_details" TEXT /* Details of the certification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_certifications_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing */,
  "price_amount" REAL /* Amount of the price */,
  "price_type" TEXT /* Type of price (e.g., list price, sale price) */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date of the price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_prices_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seller_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating record */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given to the seller (1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seller_ratings_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES sellers ("seller_id")
)
